info.description: BFF API for the CockroachDB DB Console
info.title: DB Console API

get.description: Returns the list of all databases in the cluster.
Returns events from the system event log.
Decodes a plan gist into a human-readable explain plan.
Returns index recommendations for a statement identified by
Returns schema-level insight recommendations including unused

post.description: Looks up a statement by fingerprint ID, verifies the
post.summary: Create a schema index from a recommendation

post.description: Drops a specific index by constructing a DROP INDEX statement

get.description: Returns comprehensive details for a specific transaction

post.description: Triggers collection of execution details for the specified job.

get.description: Returns status information for all nodes in the cluster.
Returns the list of schedules, optionally filtered by status.
Returns details for a specific schedule.

database_name.description: DatabaseName is the database containing the locked key.

hold_time.description: HoldTime is the duration the lock has been held.

index_name.description: IndexName is the index containing the locked key.

lock_holder_txn_id.description: LockHolderTxnID is the ID of the transaction holding the lock.

table_name.description: TableName is the table containing the locked key.

waiters.description: Waiters is the list of transactions waiting on this lock.

txn_id.description: TxnID is the ID of the waiting transaction.

wait_time.description: WaitTime is the duration the transaction has been waiting.

locks.description: Locks is the list of contended locks, grouped by lock key.

success.description: Success is true if the collection request was submitted successfully.

blocking_txn_fingerprint_id.description:
BlockingTxnFingerprintID is the fingerprint ID of the blocking
transaction.

blocking_txn_id.description: BlockingTxnID is the ID of the blocking transaction.

collection_ts.description: CollectionTS is the timestamp when the event was collected.

contention_duration.description: ContentionDuration is the duration of the contention event.

contention_type.description: ContentionType is the type of contention (e.g. LOCK_WAIT).

database_name.description: DatabaseName is the database where contention occurred.

index_name.description: IndexName is the index where contention occurred.

table_name.description: TableName is the table where contention occurred.

waiting_stmt_id.description: WaitingStmtID is the ID of the waiting statement.

waiting_txn_id.description: WaitingTxnID is the ID of the waiting transaction.

contention_events.description: ContentionEvents is the list of contention events.

database.description: Database is the database context for execution.

fingerprint_id.description: FingerprintID is the hex-encoded fingerprint ID of the statement.

recommendation.description:
Recommendation is the CREATE INDEX recommendation string, which
must match an entry in the statement's index_recommendations array.

databases.description: Databases is the list of database names.

database.description: Database is the database containing the table.

schema.description: Schema is the schema containing the table (e.g. "public").

event_type.description: EventType is the type of event (e.g. "create_database").

info.description: Info is the JSON-encoded event details.

reporting_id.description: ReportingID is the node ID that reported the event.

timestamp.description: Timestamp is the time the event occurred.

unique_id.description: UniqueID is the unique identifier for this event.

events.description: Events is the list of event log entries.

explain_plan.description: ExplainPlan is the decoded plan gist as a human-readable string.

recommendations.description:
Recommendations is a list of index recommendation strings (e.g.
"CREATE INDEX ...").

address.description: Address is the RPC address of the node.

build_tag.description: BuildTag is the build version tag of the node.

liveness_status.description: LivenessStatus is the liveness status of the node.

locality.description: Locality contains the locality information for the node.

node_id.description: NodeID is the unique identifier for the node.

num_cpus.description: NumCpus is the number of logical CPUs.

sql_address.description: SQLAddress is the SQL address of the node.

started_at.description: StartedAt is the unix timestamp when the node was started.

total_system_memory.description: TotalSystemMemory is the total RAM available to the system in bytes.

updated_at.description: UpdatedAt is the unix timestamp when the node status was last updated.

nodes.description: Nodes contains status information for all nodes in the cluster.

command.description: Command is the schedule command payload.

created.description: Created is the timestamp when the schedule was created.

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the schedule.

jobs_running.description: JobsRunning is the number of currently running jobs for this schedule.

label.description: Label is the human-readable name of the schedule.

next_run.description: NextRun is the timestamp of the next scheduled run.

owner.description: Owner is the user who owns the schedule.

recurrence.description: Recurrence is the cron-style recurrence pattern.

schedule_status.description: ScheduleStatus is the current status of the schedule.

schedules.description: Schedules is the list of schedules.

fingerprint_id.description: FingerprintID is the statement fingerprint ID.

statement.description: Statement is the full SQL statement text.

summary.description: Summary is a short summary of the statement.

database.description: Database is the database containing the object.

execution.description: Execution contains execution context for create-index recommendations.

index_details.description: IndexDetails contains index-specific metadata for the recommendation.

query.description: Query is the recommended DDL statement (e.g. "DROP INDEX ...").

type.description:
Type is the recommendation type (DropIndex, CreateIndex, ReplaceIndex,
AlterIndex).

recommendations.description: Recommendations is the list of schema insight recommendations.

app_name.description: AppName is the application name that executed the statement.

count.description: Count is the number of times this statement was executed.

database.description: Database is the database the statement was executed in.

fingerprint_id.description: FingerprintID is the hex-encoded statement fingerprint ID.

implicit_txn.description:
ImplicitTxn indicates whether the statement ran in an implicit
transaction.

index_recommendations.description:
IndexRecommendations is the list of index recommendations for this
statement.

query.description: Query is the statement SQL text.

query_summary.description: QuerySummary is a short summary of the statement.

statements.description: Statements is the list of statements using the specified index.

blocking_txn_id.description: BlockingTxnID is the ID of the blocking transaction.

contended_key.description: ContendedKey is the key that was contended.

contention_duration.description: ContentionDuration is the duration of the contention event.

index_name.description: IndexName is the index where contention occurred.

table_name.description: TableName is the table where contention occurred.

statements.description: Statements is the list of statement insights.

blocking_txn_id.description: BlockingTxnID is the ID of the blocking transaction.

blocking_txn_queries.description: BlockingTxnQueries contains the queries run by the blocking transaction.

contended_key.description: ContendedKey is the key that was contended.

contention_duration.description: ContentionDuration is the duration of the contention event.

contention_type.description: ContentionType is the type of contention.

index_name.description: IndexName is the index where contention occurred.

table_name.description: TableName is the table where contention occurred.

contention_err.description: ContentionErr is set if the contention details query failed.

statements_err.description: StatementsErr is set if the statement insights query failed.

txn_details_err.description: TxnDetailsErr is set if the transaction details query failed.

statements.description: Statements contains the statement insights for this transaction.

txn_details.description: TxnDetails contains the transaction-level insight, if available.

txn_execution_id.description: TxnExecutionID is the execution ID being queried.

transactions.description: Transactions is the list of transaction insights.
